collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (10 total Queries, 7 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT m.id as message_id, m.from_user_id, m.to_user_id, m.application_id, m.content, m.created_at, m.is_read, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = 3 THEN m.to_user_id ELSE m.from_user_id END as partner_id, a.status as application_status, a.cv_file, j.title as job_title, j.department, j.location FROM messages m LEFT JOIN applications a ON m.application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id WHERE m.from_user_id = 3 OR m.to_user_id = 3 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
SELECT user_id as id, full_name, role, avatar FROM users WHERE user_id = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM messages WHERE from_user_id = 1 AND to_user_id = 3 AND is_read = 0 AND application_id = 1

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.
queries.sql: SELECT user_id as id, full_name, role, avatar FROM users WHERE user_id = 1
